---
title: "About"
---

I'm a PhD student at University of Somewhere, working on *topic*. My
research focuses on understanding how X relates to Y. Before that, I
studied Z at University of Somewhere Else.

## Education

**PhD in Field**, University of Somewhere, *2022–present*
Thesis: *Thesis title*. Advisor: Prof. Jane Doe.

**MSc in Field**, University of Somewhere Else, *2020–2022*
Thesis: *Thesis title*.

**BSc in Field**, University of Somewhere Else, *2017–2020*

## Positions

**Visiting Researcher**, Some Lab, *Summer 2024*
Short description of what you did.

**Research Assistant**, University of Somewhere, *2021–2022*
Short description of what you did.

## Awards & grants

- **Travel grant**, Funding Body, 2024
- **Best poster**, Conference Name, 2023
- **Graduate scholarship**, University of Somewhere, 2022

## Teaching

- *Course Name*, University of Somewhere, 2023, 2024
- Guest lecture, *Course Name*, 2024

## Service

- Reviewer: *Journal Name*, *Journal Name*
- Co-organizer, Student seminar series, 2023–present
